case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. VS. MICHAEL COLES

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLES, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2791 16TH STREET, ROOM #30, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103 SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, LEASE FORFEITED, **THE RENTAL AGREEMENT IS CANCELLED** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT COLES, MICHAEL
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT COLES, MICHAEL SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $16.43 PER DAY (DAILY RENTAL VALUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC.
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JAN-27-2026.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT COLES, MICHAEL
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. SERVED AUG-19-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COLES, MICHAEL
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT COLES, MICHAEL
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT COLES, MICHAEL
